_comment: Graph series are computed from EVAL_RUNS at build time in eval-data.generated.ts. This file documents the series structure for reference. The HypothesisTracksChart and Graphs components consume data from the generated module, not from this file.

freedom.label: Freedom (bare)
freedom.source: bare workflow runs, human review score per round

csh.label: CSH (emergent)
csh.source: emergent workflow runs, human review score per round

gad.label: GAD (full framework)
gad.source: gad workflow runs, human review score per round

quality_vs_tokens.description: Shows whether more tokens correlate with better output

pressure_vs_quality.description: Shows whether game pressure mechanics correlate with review scores
